functionDescription.value: An intense artificial sweetener used in place of sugar to sweeten foods and drinks at a fraction of the quantity.

regulatoryStatus.value: Permitted as sweetener E951 for retail sale in Great Britain under retained food additive law.

authorityPosition.value: The Food Standards Agency states that aspartame is safe to consume at the established acceptable daily intake; this cites that authority position and does not synthesise primary studies.
